src: A fluffy Persian kitten with a brown and cream coat and black stripes. It has blue eyes, a bushy tail, and whiskers around its round face. Standing confidently on delicate paws.
edit: A knitted cat toy in vibrant colors with blue and green yarn, embroidered eyes, and a stitched mouth. It has triangular, stuffed ears and a visibly knitted texture. The curled tail is made from multicolored wool.

per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-QfOnteIcGZU-unsplash: The object stands sideways, head on the left, on a grey tiled staircase with a fluffy, upturned tail. There's a parallel metal railing and soft light from the top right, with a blurred background.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-SGFLjexLlaI-unsplash: The object is in a close-up view on the grey staircase, facing forward, bushy tail slightly lowered, daylight from the right side.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-av2WGfogjqg-unsplash: The object sits on the stair with paws close together, body slightly tilted, next to a vertical metal railing on its right, under soft, even light.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-bhonzdJMVjY-unsplash: The object is on a grey step, front legs apart, head turned to face the camera, with shiny metal railing in the background under bright diffused lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-t_Z5ND4Ce3k-unsplash: The object sits at the edge of a stair, looking slightly to the side, with a fluffy tail and metal railing. Ambient light creates soft shadows.

per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-QfOnteIcGZU-unsplash: The object is sideways, head on the left, on a grey staircase of knitted yarn, with a fluffy textured tail upright. A woolen railing is parallel. Light from the top right casts knitted shadows, with a blurred knitted scene background in a knitted style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-SGFLjexLlaI-unsplash: The object stands in close-up on a staircase of intertwined grey yarn, shaped from tightly looped stitches. Its bushy tail cascades with looping fibers. Daylight from the right highlights the intricate knit patterns.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-av2WGfogjqg-unsplash: The object is perched on the stair, its paws resembling soft, knitted wool, close together. The body with a yarn-like tilt is next to a vertical metal railing on its right, casting a warm, fiber-filled glow.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-bhonzdJMVjY-unsplash: The object is on a grey step, resembling a knitted blanket. Its yarn front legs are apart, head turned slightly, made of soft fabric, gazing at the viewer. A metal railing is in the background, like a knitted pattern.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-t_Z5ND4Ce3k-unsplash: The object sits at the edge of a stair, resembling a cozy knitted creature, with a woven yarn-like tail. The metal railing has a knitted texture. The ambient light casts gentle shadows on the intricate loops and knots.
